story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 16: The Threshold
**act** · shared · narrative

Bound 2026-05-13 (inception state · one workshop with three rooms · Faunia 🪶/Bestia 📖/Therai 🐾/Caducea ☤). Restructured 2026-05-14 into the Threshold District (three sibling shops at V59 · Pandia 🌕/Hermaion ⚚/Faunia 🪶/Caducea ☤). Frontmatter keeper_succession routes readers from the bound act's inception cast to the canonical v1.6.0 cast; the body preserves the inception naming for narrative provenance.
> *Three keepers, one vertex, three rooms. The thirteenth workshop opens as a workshop of thresholds.*

story.title: Read the full text

- *founds* → [[the Familiars]]
- *inhabits* → [[V59 — Threshold District (Pandia · Hermaion · Faunia)]]
- *introduces* → [[C56 · Caduceus as Pre-Formal Dual-Agent Symbol]]
- *introduces* → [[C57 · Staff-Mage Collapse · Held Open]]
- *introduces* → [[C58 · Forge(t) ∥ Threshold Sibling Swordsman-Suppliers]]
- *introduces* → [[C59 · Create-Format as Gateway to Mage-Tier]]
